title: Project Metadata
description: Document-control header shared by the HRCW Register, Hold Point Schedule and Risk Register. Missing fields carry the literal placeholder '[Client To Confirm]' and the document still issues.

whs_consultant.description: Preparing consultant. Use '[Client To Confirm]' if not yet assigned.

jurisdiction.description: Default NSW (WHS Act 2011 / WHS Regulation 2017). Any other state/territory must be expressly stated.

revision.description: Revision identifier (e.g. Rev04). Use '[Client To Confirm]' if not set.

methodology_sequence.description: Construction methodology mapped in sequence — established BEFORE HRCW triggers are assessed.

trade_packages.description: Canonical package names. Single source of truth — every table's package names must match this list.

interfaces_constraints.description: Key interfaces and constraints (public road, occupied strata, asset owners, adjacent trades).
